source.title: Pinduoduo Buyer Behavior, Frequency, and Multi-homing Data (2025-2026)

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo MAU 708M (Sep 2025), vs Taobao 983M, JD 610M, Douyin 936M. Implied multi-homing: combined MAUs far exceed China's 1.09B internet users, confirming massive overlap.
extractions.evidence: QuestMobile数据：2025年9月拼多多MAU为7.08亿，淘宝9.83亿，京东6.1亿，抖音9.36亿。中国网民总数约10.9亿，意味着各平台用户高度重叠。

verification.verifier_notes: QuestMobile data, September 2025. Multi-homing implied mathematically.

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo average order value ~50 RMB (~$7), 10x smaller than JD (~$60), 4-5x smaller than Taobao (~$30). Annual spend per buyer ~$780 vs Tmall ~$1,200+.
extractions.evidence: 拼多多单均价维持在50元左右。Average orders on Pinduoduo are 10x smaller than JD.com. Average order is $6-7 on PDD, $30 on Taobao/Tmall, $60 on JD.com. Annual average spend per China buyer ~$780.

verification.verifier_notes: Cross-referenced from multiple analyst reports and KR-Asia

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo core users are price-sensitive, ~70% from tier-3/4 cities. But tier-1 city penetration growing: 2023 Double 11 tier-1 orders +113% YoY via Billion Subsidies.
extractions.evidence: 拼多多用户约70%来自三四线城市。2023年双11期间，百亿补贴一线城市用户订单量同比增长113%。下沉市场渗透率已达89%。

verification.verifier_notes: From company disclosures and Jiguang data

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo user engagement: 36.1% of total e-commerce user time during 2024 Double 11, surpassing Taobao. Monthly usage: 323.5 minutes, 96.5 sessions — both #1 among e-commerce apps.
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo captured 36.1% of total user time during 2024 Double 11 period. 拼多多月人均使用时长323.5分钟及使用次数96.5次，力压排名第二的电商平台。

verification.verifier_notes: QuestMobile data. CIW.news report confirmed engagement leadership.

extractions.claim: Purchase frequency: ~90 orders/year per active buyer (Chinese source), or ~70/year from 2021 data (61B orders / 869M buyers). 2025 figure: ~19B orders / 900M+ buyers = ~21/year, suggesting methodology change.
extractions.evidence: 拼多多核心用户单用户年购买频次约90次。2021 data: 61B orders / 869M active buyers ≈ 70 orders/year. 2025: 19B annual orders with 900M+ buyers ≈ 21 orders/year.

verification.verifier_notes: The 90x figure from Chinese source (woshipm.com) may use different buyer activity definition. The 19B vs 61B discrepancy likely reflects changed counting methodology or platform scope.

extractions.claim: Why users choose Pinduoduo: 1) Lowest prices (60% of JD, 70% of Alibaba), 2) Social sharing/group buying, 3) Gamification (daily deals discovery vs search-based), 4) C2M direct factory model
extractions.evidence: 拼多多商品平均价格仅为京东的60%，阿里巴巴的70%。93.1%的淘宝/京东用户通过关键词搜索找商品，而拼多多用户多数浏览当日特价。超80%小镇中青年无提示提到拼多多。

verification.verifier_notes: Multiple sources confirm price positioning and discovery-based shopping behavior

extractions.claim: JD purchase frequency grew 40% YoY in 2025, with annual active users breaking 700M in October 2025. JD PLUS conversion rate exceeds PDD's Duo Duo Maicai, but JD PLUS penetration only 15% vs PDD's 25%.
extractions.evidence: 京东用户更忠诚，年活7亿，购物频次+40%。京东PLUS会员转化率超拼多多的多多买菜，但渗透率仅15% vs 拼多多的25%。

verification.verifier_notes: From QuestMobile and financial analysis reports (2025)
